feed.title: The Lancet
feed.subtitle: The Lancet is an independent, international weekly general medical journal.

entry.title: Global burden of cardiovascular disease in 2025: a systematic analysis
entry.summary: Cardiovascular disease remains the leading cause of death globally. In 2025, CVD accounted for an estimated 19.8 million deaths, a 12% increase from 2015.

entry.title: Artificial intelligence in clinical diagnostics: a Müller-Hinton analysis
entry.summary: Deep learning models achieved diagnostic accuracy comparable to specialist physicians across 14 medical specialties in a prospective multinational trial.
